mode.label: Mode
mode.vpnHint: VPN — ready to route all apps

install.title: Enable VPN mode
install.body: Leshiy needs to install a small helper to route all of this device's traffic through the tunnel. You'll be asked for your system password once.
install.bullet1: Creates a virtual network adapter (TUN) and updates your routes & DNS
install.bullet2: Runs only while VPN mode is on; restores your network on disconnect
install.bullet3: Open-source & minimal — it never sees your keys or traffic.
install.authNote: OS auth prompt (UAC / sudo / Touch ID) follows. Removable anytime from Settings → VPN.

config.title: Configs
config.name: Name
config.empty: No configs yet. Paste a leshiy:// link or scan a QR image.
config.invalid: That isn't a valid leshiy:// link.

settings.title: Settings
settings.killSwitchVpn: Kill switch — blocks traffic if the tunnel drops
settings.restartNote: Transport and port changes apply on next launch.

close_dialog.title: Close Leshiy?
close_dialog.body: Do you want to quit the app entirely, or keep it running in the system tray?

splitTunnel.title: Split tunnel
splitTunnel.includeHint: Only these go through the tunnel
splitTunnel.addRule: Add a CIDR, IP, or domain
splitTunnel.noSubs: No subscriptions. Add a preset or a custom list.
splitTunnel.hintInclude: Include rules do nothing in Exclude mode (everything already goes through the VPN). Switch the mode above to Include to route only these through the VPN.
splitTunnel.hintExclude: Exclude rules do nothing in Include mode (everything is already direct).
